scripts.build: git config lfs.url https://github.com/ybeststudio/Metin2-Web-Client.git/info/lfs && git lfs fetch --all && OID=$(grep -oP 'sha256:\K[a-f0-9]+' models/map_city.glb) && SRC=".git/lfs/objects/${OID:0:2}/${OID:2:2}/$OID" && echo "Copying LFS object..." && cp "$SRC" models/map_city.glb && ls -lh models/map_city.glb && echo 'Done'
